chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-2371 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing 1. For orders on CMA No.17783 of 2025 2. For orders on office objections No.1 to 6 3. For hearing of main case 24.09.2025 Mr. Moulvi Iqbal Haider, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Abdus Samad, Advocate for NADRA Ms. Zehra Sehar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan ************ Objections have been submitted on behalf of Respondent- NADRA, which reflects that the Petitioner is required to appear before Verification & Revocation Branch, RHO NADRA Karachi along with documentary evidence prior to 1979 for processing her case, in accordance with law. Learned Counsel for NADRA undertakes if the Petitioner appears before the aforementioned Branch then her case would be dealt with in accordance with law, rules and policy within a period of thirty days from today. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied with such undertaking. By consent, this petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms along with pending application[s], if any. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban
